title: Bare Bones X Snowy Sniffer
description:
A texturepack that supports the mod "Snowy Sniffer" in 
the Bare Bones Style
body:
ABOUT:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A texturepacks that support the mod "Snowy Sniffer" with the Bare Bones style .You can find the mod here :[https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-sniffer](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-sniffer).
_Enjoy_!
